name: Visual Photonics Epitaxy Co., Ltd.
summary: Visual Photonics Epitaxy Co., Ltd. provides solutions for wireless and optical fiber communications, and solar cell applications. The company offers GaAs heterojunction bipolar transistor (HBT), low turn-on voltage HBT, high voltage HBT, InP HBT and HEMT, GaAs PHEMT and BiHEMT, and GaN epi wafers. It also provides GaAs PD, InGaAs PD and APD, Zn diffusion ready InGaAs PD and APD, long wavelength InGaAs PD, F-P and DFB LD, and VCSEL epi wafers; and solar cell epi wafers, as well as customerized epi foundry services. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
